use_cases: Counting down to product launches or feature releases
Displaying time remaining for limited offers or flash sales
Showing countdown to event start times like webinars or live streams
Creating urgency for countdown-based marketing campaigns
Displaying live statistics that animate on value changes
ai_summary: A flip-style countdown timer component that displays numbers with a smooth card-flip animation when values change. Supports large numbers using BigInt and customizable colors. Automatically counts down from a starting value to a target with real-time animated digit transitions.
